title: Travel Gift Card Options
description: Which flexible travel‑experience gift cards or vouchers can be purchased in France (including Amazon.fr and Smartbox) that allow the recipient to choose dates and cover activities such as hot‑air‑balloon rides or wine‑region stays?
narrative: The user is looking for gift‑card solutions that provide travel experiences in France and broader Europe without a fixed travel date. Relevant results should describe products like Smartbox travel boxes (e.g., hot‑air‑balloon, wine‑tour, culinary trips) and Amazon.fr gift vouchers that can be used to book such experiences, note any date‑restriction policies, geographical availability (Metropolitan France, Corsica, Belgium, Luxembourg), pricing, and shipping details. Items that require a set date, are limited to non‑travel goods, or cannot be redeemed for travel experiences are not relevant.

title: Sheep to Table
description: How can I combine optimal sheep breeding and nutrition practices with an effective oven‑roasted lamb shoulder recipe to produce tender, flavorful meat?
narrative: The user wants a holistic view that connects ovine production (breeds, genetics, nutrition, and management systems for lamb) with culinary preparation (a step‑by‑step oven‑roasted lamb shoulder recipe). Relevant documents are those that discuss sheep production systems, races, genetics, and nutrition as well as the detailed lamb shoulder cooking instructions. Documents covering only one of these domains without linking animal husbandry to cooking are less relevant.

title: Clio Hybrid Hunt
description: What used Renault Clio hybrid models are currently available in Haute‑Savoie with low mileage and a price under €22,000?
narrative: The user is looking for recent used‑car listings of Renault Clio that are equipped with a hybrid powertrain, sold in the Haute‑Savoie region of France. Relevant results must be hybrid (e‑tech), preferably automatic transmission, have mileage below roughly 20,000 km, and be priced at €22,000 or less. Listings should include typical buyer‑interest features such as Bluetooth, GPS, and climate control, and must clearly state the location (Haute‑Savoie) and price.

title: Inclusive Chef Position
description: What chef job opportunities involve training people with disabilities and include recipes that are suitable for such workshops?
narrative: The user is looking for employment listings for chefs who will work in environments that support people with disabilities (e.g., ESAT, therapeutic cooking centers) and for practical, moderately simple recipes that can be used in training sessions with disabled participants. Relevant results should describe job duties such as supervising, teaching, and adapting menus, and should provide recipes like Cyril Lignac’s Veal Paupiettes with Mushrooms, highlighting preparation time, ingredient simplicity, and possible modifications (e.g., adding cream or mustard) to accommodate various skill levels.

title: Baby Sunscreen
description: What factors should I consider when choosing a sunscreen for my baby or young child?
narrative: The user wants detailed guidance on selecting a safe, effective sunscreen for infants and toddlers. Relevant aspects include the appropriate SPF level, broad‑spectrum UV protection, hypoallergenic and non‑toxic ingredients, organic or mineral (physical) filters, water resistance, age suitability (e.g., from 3 months), fragrance‑free formulation, and avoidance of harmful additives such as parabens, aluminum, or nanoparticles. Documents that list top baby sunscreens and explain sunscreen types, SPF interpretation, and buying criteria satisfy the need, while unrelated information about hybrid cars is not relevant.

title: Faction Switching
description: How can I change my faction contract in Star Conflict without losing unlocked research and equipment?
narrative: The user is looking for a detailed explanation of the process for switching factions (or sub‑factions) in the space combat game Star Conflict, including the credit cost, whether progress, research, and purchased items are retained, and how the change affects access to faction‑specific equipment. Relevant material must describe the contract‑change mechanic, the impact on research trees, and any penalties or benefits associated with switching.

title: Power2Act Participation
description: How can ENGIE employees get involved in the Power2Act program and what are the selection criteria for projects?
narrative: The user seeks detailed information about ENGIE's internal Power2Act initiative, including eligibility for staff, how to submit a project proposal, the transparent criteria used by the jury to select projects, examples of previously chosen projects, and the appropriate contact (e.g., power2act@engie.com). Documents that mention Power2Act, its purpose, selection process, and contact information are considered relevant.

title: Economic War School
description: Locate comprehensive details about the founders, mission, and recent fundraising activities of the School of Economic War.
narrative: Relevant documents must describe the origin of the School of Economic War, naming its five founding authors (Christian Harbulot, Nicolas Moinet, Ali Laïdi, Eric Delbecque, Olivier De Maison Rouge), explain its purpose of studying and conceptualising economic warfare, and provide information on the recent fundraising evening (including criticisms of its online registration and publicity). Any source that discusses the school's manifesto, objectives, or public events is considered relevant.

title: Pôle Emploi Update
description: When are the 2022 monthly update deadlines for Pôle emploi and how can a submitted mistake be corrected?
narrative: The user seeks detailed information on the 2022 schedule for the mandatory monthly update with Pôle emploi, including the opening date (end of the month), the closing deadline (mid‑month, roughly a 15‑day window), the methods for completing the update (online form via personal space, telephone 3949, UNIDIALOG kiosk), and the procedure for fixing an error after submission (same‑day amendment, contacting Pôle emploi via phone, agency visit, or counselor). Relevant results must contain these deadline dates, the submission channels, and the correction steps.

title: Construction Client Portal
description: What functionalities does LMP's online client space offer for monitoring a house‑building project and how can a client use it effectively?
narrative: The user is seeking a detailed overview of the LMP Builder online client space, including the types of information and tools available (real‑time worksite tracking, access to contracts and documents, communication with the builder, maintenance advice, thermal study reports, guarantees, etc.) and practical guidance on how to navigate and exploit these features. Relevant documents are those that describe the client portal’s capabilities, its purpose, and any instructions or demonstrations of its use. Documents that merely mention the builder or unrelated banking services are not relevant.

title: Hybrid Cost Comparison
description: How does the total cost of ownership, fuel consumption, and CO₂ emissions of the Volvo V60 plug‑in hybrid compare to conventional diesel and fully electric cars?
narrative: The user seeks documents that provide a side‑by‑side evaluation of the Volvo V60 Hybrid Rechargeable (including its 1.9 L/100 km fuel consumption, 49 g/km CO₂ emissions, 50 km electric‑only range, purchase price premium, electricity operating cost of ~€0.27/10 km, and battery specifications) against typical diesel vehicles and fully electric models such as the Renault ZOE and Nissan Leaf. Relevant material must contain quantitative data on purchase price (including bonuses and discounts), operating costs per kilometre (fuel, electricity, battery rental), maintenance expenses, range figures, and emissions. Sources that discuss the economic impact of battery rental schemes, the effect of renewable electricity contracts, and performance metrics (e.g., 0‑100 km/h times, torque) are also relevant. Documents lacking concrete cost, emission, or range figures, or that only describe qualitative features, are not considered relevant.

title: Alfalfa Pesticide Ban
description: What are the agronomic, economic, and environmental impacts of eliminating carcinogenic pesticide products from alfalfa cultivation in France?
narrative: The user wants sources that assess the consequences of withdrawing hazardous plant‑protection chemicals for alfalfa, covering changes in yield and protein quality, effects on crop rotation and soil health, farmer employment and regional economies, and alignment with France’s sustainable‑agriculture goals. Relevant material should include policy proposals, farmer testimonies, and analyses of alternative weed‑control methods or organic practices.

title: Rally Participants
description: Which individuals listed in the classification roster were competitors in the 2012 Rally National Ain‑Jura – Coupe de France des Rallyes?
narrative: The user is looking for evidence that connects the names from the extensive classification list (e.g., PERCIN Philippe, DUMAS Virginia, etc.) to the official 2012 Rally National Ain‑Jura event. Relevant documents should mention both the person's name and the rally (including stage numbers, dates 25‑26 June 2012, or final results). Documents that only list names without any rally context, or that discuss unrelated topics such as poetry, are not relevant.

title: Windsor Coach Tour
description: What are the main attractions, accommodations, and travel logistics for a coach trip covering Windsor, Runnymede, and Hampton Court?
narrative: The user is planning a short historical vacation in the UK and wants a detailed overview of a coach‑based itinerary that includes visits to Windsor Castle, the Magna Carta site at Runnymede, and Hampton Court Palace. Relevant information should describe the coach service, nearby hotels (e.g., Hilton St Anne's), river activities, meals, guided commentary, accessibility options, and any tips on crowd timing or ticket arrangements. Documents that discuss these specific locations, transportation, lodging, and visitor experiences are considered relevant.

title: Be tv new series
description: When do the new series debut on Be tv during the September‑October back‑to‑school lineup?
narrative: The user is looking for the exact broadcast dates, times, and channels for the newly introduced series on Be tv as part of the back‑to‑school event. Relevant information includes the first‑episode air dates and times for series such as "Succession", "Mr. Mercedes", "Killing Eve", "The Deuce", "The Walking Dead", "French Guiana", "The Legends Bureau", etc., as well as the Be tv channel numbers (e.g., Be 1, Be Series) and any repeat or simulcast slots. Documents that list the premiere dates (e.g., September 3rd at 8:30 pm, 10:25 pm, 9:30 pm, etc.) and schedule details are considered relevant.

title: Haiti Aid Corruption
description: What mechanisms were established to ensure transparency and prevent misappropriation of the international reconstruction funds allocated to Haiti after the 2010 earthquake?
narrative: The user is seeking information on the oversight structures, policies, and actors (e.g., the Interim Commission for the Reconstruction of Haiti, UN involvement, Bill Clinton's role) that were created to manage the billions of dollars pledged for Haiti's post‑earthquake reconstruction, as well as documented concerns or evidence of corruption. Relevant documents should describe these mechanisms, their implementation, and any reported successes or failures in preventing fund diversion.

title: Moulin Pantheon
description: When was Jean Moulin interred in the Pantheon, what events and speeches were part of the ceremony, and which notable figures and controversies were associated with it?
narrative: Relevant material should describe the 19 December 1964 Pantheon ceremony for Jean Moulin, including details of the procession, speeches (e.g., Charles de Gaulle’s oration), participants such as Maurice Papon, Aude Terray’s account, and the political or historiographic debates that followed. Documents focused solely on unrelated topics, such as gardening or molasses, are not relevant.

title: Shot Potato Prep
description: What are the best ways to select, store, and cook shot (small) potatoes so they stay firm, retain nutrients, and avoid blackening?
narrative: The user wants practical guidance on handling shot potatoes, including how to identify high‑quality tubers (firm, uniform colour, no germination), optimal storage conditions (dry, refrigerated in paper or cloth bags, away from light), seasonal availability, and cooking techniques that preserve vitamin B and C while preventing over‑cooking and blackening (e.g., roasting at 180 °C, steaming for 15 min, pan‑frying with oil and aromatics, checking doneness with a knife). Relevant documents must discuss these selection criteria, storage tips, nutritional facts, and the various recommended cooking methods.

title: OTRE Congress
description: When and where is the next OTRE congress, and what are its main theme, agenda items, and featured speakers?
narrative: The user wants precise information about the upcoming OTRE congress, including the date (8 October), venue (Espace Charenton, Paris), overall theme (“Let us reinvent ourselves! Intermediate bodies, what are they for?”), the schedule of speeches, debates, and workshops, and the identities of notable guests and speakers such as Myriam El Khomri, Nicolas Perruchot, François Asselin, and Elisabeth Borne. Documents that provide these details are considered relevant.

title: Green Energy Comparison
description: Which French electricity (and gas) supplier offers the lowest price for 100% renewable energy while also having high customer satisfaction?
narrative: The user wants to select a residential energy provider in France that combines three key attributes: (1) the electricity (and optionally gas) supplied is 100% renewable (e.g., solar, wind, biogas); (2) the price per kWh and any subscription fees result in the lowest overall annual bill compared to other suppliers; and (3) the supplier enjoys strong positive consumer ratings or reviews. Relevant documents are those that describe the green (renewable) offers of providers such as Planet Yes, Mint Energie, Total Direct Energie, ENI, Sowee, and others, include price information, discounts, promo codes, contract terms, and customer satisfaction scores or opinion summaries. Any source that details price per kWh, subscription discounts, green certification, and consumer feedback will be considered relevant.

title: Hyundai Rental Alghero
description: What Hyundai models are available for rent in Alghero, Sardinia, and how do their prices and key features compare?
narrative: The user is interested in renting a Hyundai vehicle in Alghero, Italy. Relevant information must list the specific Hyundai models offered (e.g., i30, Getz, IX35, Santa Fe, Tucson), indicate whether they are available (or note unavailability), and provide details such as transmission type, seating capacity, luggage space, safety and comfort features, and price or price‑range comparisons across rental providers. Documents that only mention other brands, generic rental services without Hyundai specifics, or lack price/feature details are not relevant.

title: Gaulish Women Warriors
description: What historical evidence describes the participation of Celtic women in the resistance against Julius Caesar’s conquest of Gaul?
narrative: The user seeks sources that detail the role of Gallic women—such as priestesses, warriors, council members, and leaders—during the Roman invasion of Gaul. Relevant documents should discuss female combatants, their strategic influence, notable figures like Velléda, and contemporary or later scholarly commentary on gynecocratic structures. Material unrelated to the Roman–Gaul conflict (e.g., modern weather chat logs) is not relevant.

title: Winnipeg Luxury Rental
description: What luxury car rental models, prices, age requirements, and company rankings are available for downtown Winnipeg?
narrative: The user is planning to rent a premium vehicle in downtown Winnipeg and needs a comprehensive overview of the options. Relevant documents should provide the list of luxury models (e.g., Nissan Maxima, Chrysler 300C), daily rates (including the $83.04 per day example), any promotional codes, and the ability to compare multiple suppliers. The answer must also cover policy details such as minimum driver age, youth driver surcharges, fuel‑tank requirements, and pick‑up/return locations (airport, Marion Street, etc.). Information about the highest‑rated rental companies (e.g., Enterprise) and tips for obtaining the best deal (early booking, weekly rentals) is also required. Only documents that contain these specifics about luxury rentals in Winnipeg’s downtown area are considered relevant.

title: Cannes Luxury Rental
description: What luxury sports cars are available for rent in Cannes, and what are their daily rates and booking conditions?
narrative: The user wants to rent a high‑end sports or luxury vehicle (e.g., Ferrari, Lamborghini, Porsche) in Cannes. Relevant information must include specific car models, their per‑day prices, any location‑specific notes, and rental terms such as minimum rental period or driver requirements. Documents that list luxury cars, pricing, and Cannes as the city of hire satisfy the request.

title: Potato Storage Solutions
description: What effective post‑harvest storage methods can be used to reduce potato losses and maintain quality, especially in developing regions?
narrative: The user seeks information on practical storage technologies and practices for potatoes that mitigate pest infestation, temperature and humidity damage, and extend shelf‑life. Relevant documents should describe methods such as metal hermetic silos, cooling facilities, evaporative cooling (zeer pots), and other low‑cost or community‑based approaches, provide examples or case studies (e.g., Kenya cooling plant, East African metal silos), and discuss their impact on loss reduction and food‑security outcomes.

title: Leonardo at Chambord
description: What architectural features of the Château de Chambord were designed by Leonardo da Vinci and how did they develop during the castle’s construction?
narrative: The user is looking for detailed information on Leonardo da Vinci’s architectural influence at Château de Chambord, specifically identifying elements such as the double‑helix staircase, roof terrace, and any other design innovations attributed to him, as well as the chronological context of their creation. Relevant passages must describe these features, mention Leonardo’s involvement, and situate them within the broader construction history of the castle.

title: Boat Rental Choices
description: What types of boats can be rented through Filovent and how do the options differ when hiring with versus without a skipper?
narrative: The user is looking for a detailed overview of Filovent's boat rental catalogue, including the various vessel categories (e.g., sailing boats, catamarans, motorboats, yachts, caiques, etc.) and the availability of skipper services for each. Relevant information must describe the differences in equipment, pricing, and conditions between rentals with a skipper and self‑driven rentals, as well as any guarantees, customer satisfaction metrics, and booking procedures mentioned in the source documents.

title: Grand Scenic Lease
description: What are the current lease options, monthly payments, and associated features for the Renault Grand Scenic 7‑seat monospace in France?
narrative: The user is looking for detailed information about leasing the Renault Grand Scenic, including the length of the lease, initial down‑payment, monthly rent, total cost over the term, and any highlighted equipment or technology that comes with the lease. Relevant documents should mention lease durations (e.g., 49 months), first rent amounts, monthly rent figures, pricing of different trims, and descriptions of key features such as R‑LINK, modular seating, and safety equipment. Information about financing options, energy class, and comparable models is only marginally relevant.

title: Rental Cancellation Policy
description: What are the fees, time windows, and refund conditions for cancelling a pre‑paid car rental reservation on EconomyBookings.com?
narrative: The user is looking for a comprehensive explanation of the cancellation terms for a pre‑paid car rental, including the specific fee amounts (e.g., €75, €150), the required notice periods (48 hours, 24 hours, less than 24 hours), how the amount of the pre‑payment influences eligibility for a refund, any differences when Cancellation Protection is purchased, and related concepts such as "defection" and change fees. Documents that describe these cancellation fees, refund calculations, and policy exceptions are considered relevant.

title: Car Rental Comparison
description: What are the price differences, service features, and environmental policies between Europcar at Wroclaw Railway Station and Zotcar private rentals in La Réunion?
narrative: The user wants to compare two car‑rental providers—Europcar in Poland and Zotcar in La Réunion—focusing on rental prices, available vehicle types, booking requirements, operating hours, and sustainability initiatives. Documents that mention Europcar’s hours, green charter, and location details or Zotcar’s lower pricing, private‑owner model, and ecological positioning are relevant.

title: Lincoln MKX Fuel
description: What is the average fuel consumption of a 2009 Lincoln MKX FWD in liters per 100 km and miles per gallon?
narrative: The user wants reliable fuel‑efficiency figures for a 2009 Lincoln MKX front‑wheel‑drive model, including average L/100 km and mpg values derived from testing. Relevant results should provide measured consumption data, test conditions, vehicle specifications (engine size, transmission), and the date of the test.

title: Ivory Coast Accidents
description: What recent traffic accidents have occurred in Côte d'Ivoire, and what details are reported about their locations, causes, and casualties?
narrative: The user is looking for news reports of traffic accidents that took place in Côte d'Ivoire (e.g., Abidjan, San‑Pedro, Lakota, Yopougon, etc.). Relevant documents should describe the date or time of the incident, the specific location (road, bridge, city or village), the type of vehicle(s) involved, the identified or suspected cause (e.g., driver impairment, brake failure, overloading), and the resulting injuries or deaths. Articles that only cover accidents outside Côte d'Ivoire or that lack substantive details about the incident are not relevant.

title: Bordeaux June 2018
description: What cultural, culinary, and recreational events are taking place in Bordeaux during the weekend of June 8‑10, 2018?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive overview of all activities scheduled in Bordeaux for the weekend of 8–10 June 2018, including festivals, pop‑up stores, exhibitions, sports trials, and other public events. Relevant results should list each event’s name, date, venue, and a brief description so the user can decide which to attend.

title: Forez Boundaries
description: What are the historical and current geographic boundaries of the French region of Forez?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive information describing the extent of Forez, including its historic province limits, the communes and intercommunalities that compose the modern Pays du Forez, and the natural features (plain, mountains, rivers) that define the area. Relevant documents must discuss the historic county of Forez, its evolution under the Ancien Régime, the present-day administrative boundaries (Loire, Puy‑de‑Dôme, etc.), and any references to the region’s geography, population, and cultural characteristics.

title: Marseille Green Apartment
description: Which apartments for sale in Marseille have low estimated annual energy costs and are suitable for integration with future renewable electricity sources?
narrative: The user is looking for real‑estate listings in Marseille that include detailed energy performance information (e.g., estimated annual energy expenditure, heating type, insulation) and wants to assess how the property's electricity consumption could benefit from decarbonisation measures such as wind or solar power. Relevant documents must contain apartment sale descriptions with energy cost estimates and any discussion of renewable or intermittent energy sources, policies, or technologies that could affect future electricity bills.

title: Montpellier Tobacco Shops
description: I need a complete list of tobacco shop (bureau de tabac) locations in Montpellier, including their names and addresses.
narrative: The user is seeking information about all tobacco retail outlets (bureau de tabac) situated in Montpellier, France. Relevant results must mention a tobacco office located in Montpellier and provide the establishment's name and street address. Records for tobacco offices in other cities or any non‑tobacco businesses are not relevant.

title: Skipper Larval Defense
description: What defensive behaviors and chemical mechanisms do silver‑spotted skipper (Epargyreus clarus) larvae use to protect themselves from predators, parasitoids, and pathogens?
narrative: The user seeks detailed information on the anti‑predator and anti‑parasite strategies of silver‑spotted skipper caterpillars, including shelter construction, frass‑ejection, regurgitated chemicals, and susceptibility to wasps and viruses. Relevant passages must describe these defenses, their effectiveness, and any documented interactions with predators or pathogens.

title: Disruptive Meaning
description: What are the historical meanings, etymology, and literary/technical usage of the adjective "disruptive"?
narrative: The user is looking for a thorough explanation of the term "disruptive," covering its Latin origin (disrumpere), its evolution into modern English, and how it is used in different contexts such as electrical discharge, metaphorical language, and philosophical writing. Relevant information includes definition details, etymological notes, example citations from authors like Poincaré and Bergson, and any noted nuances in literary or technical usage.

title: Free Car Games
description: What free online car games are available that let players build or customize their vehicles, similar to the LEGO® Creator 31089 Race Car?
narrative: The user is looking for a curated list of completely free car‑racing or driving games (web‑based, mobile, or downloadable) that include a vehicle‑building or customization component comparable to the LEGO Creator 31089 set. Relevant results should describe the game name, platform, core gameplay (racing vs. building), available customization options, and confirm that the game can be played without any purchase or hidden fees. Games that are only pay‑to‑play, lack any building/customization feature, or are unrelated to cars should be excluded.

title: Disability Hiring Aid
description: What are the eligibility criteria, amounts, and application procedures for financial assistance to employ a disabled worker in France?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive information on French public aid programs for hiring disabled employees, including who can benefit, the types of subsidies (e.g., Agefiph, Pôle Emploi, COVID‑19 adaptations), maximum amounts, required documentation (e.g., disability severity acknowledgment, occupational health certificates), and step‑by‑step application processes. Relevant documents must clearly describe eligibility, funding limits, renewal possibilities, and any conditions for combining aids.

title: Space Sci-Fi Streaming
description: Which space‑focused science‑fiction movies are currently available to watch on Canal+ in HD?
narrative: The user wants a curated list of science‑fiction films whose main setting is outer space (e.g., Star Trek titles, Apollo 18, Planet of the Apes, etc.) that are offered by the Canal+ streaming platform. Relevant results should mention both a space‑themed sci‑fi movie and that it is available on Canal+ (preferably in HD), and may include additional details such as release year or brief description.

title: Antique Oil Lamp Valuation
description: What are the typical price ranges, provenance details, and condition descriptions for 19th‑century French oil lamps sold at auction or on online marketplaces?
narrative: The user is researching historic French oil lamps to estimate their market value and understand relevant provenance, dimensions, maker marks, and condition reports. Documents are relevant if they provide listings, auction results, seller descriptions, technical specifications (e.g., maker J.S. Laiton, clockwork mechanisms, serial numbers), pricing information, and any commentary on authenticity or rarity.

title: Morocco Car Rental
description: What car rental agencies operate in Morocco and what locations, vehicle types, and tourist-friendly services do they offer?
narrative: The user is planning to travel in Morocco and wants to identify reputable car‑rental companies, the cities where they have branches (e.g., Marrakech, Casablanca, Rabat, Fez, Tangier), the kinds of cars available (standard, coach, etc.), pricing or service highlights, and any special provisions for tourists or Moroccan expatriates. Documents that list agency names, city coverage, fleet descriptions, and service features are considered relevant.

title: MONALISA Smoked Potatoes
description: What are the optimal cultivation, harvest, and storage practices for MONALISA potatoes to prepare a smoked potato dish?
narrative: The user wants comprehensive guidance that combines agronomic advice for the MONALISA variety (including sowing time, sensitivity to shocks, ideal harvest windows at 90 days for fresh use versus 120 days for storage) with a step‑by‑step smoked potato recipe. Relevant documents must describe the cultivar’s characteristics, recommended harvest timing, and any handling tips, as well as the cooking procedure (peeling, dicing, sautéing with onions, butter‑oil mixture, simmering, browning, and optional herbs) and total preparation time. Documents that lack either the cultivation details or the recipe specifics are not relevant.

title: Senior Hiring Incentives
description: What financial aid, tax breaks, and contractual options are available to employers who hire workers aged 45 or older?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive information on government-supported programs that encourage the employment of senior workers, including the amount and conditions of state subsidies, tax exemptions, bonus schemes, eligible contract types (e.g., professionalisation contracts, CDI/CDD), eligibility thresholds (age 45+, 50+, 55+), and any related employer obligations. Relevant documents are those that describe these aid measures, eligibility criteria, contract forms, and associated benefits for hiring employees over the specified age.
